title: can't exchange partition for table create fk then drop fk
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE pt37 (id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, t_id INT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE nt37 (id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, t_id INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_id FOREIGN KEY (t_id) REFERENCES pt37(id));
ALTER TABLE nt37 DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_id;
ALTER TABLE pt37 ADD PARTITION (PARTITION p0 VALUES IN (1));
key_bug_features: exchange partition with table having foreign key references
